productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Casual Blue Bag
description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It's a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and backpacks. At American Tourister we are proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 42 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 19 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main zipped compartment with a zippered slot insideTwo zipped pockets on the front A zippered pocket on the side and a mesh pouch on the otherPadded haul loop for easy carryingAdjustable, padded shoulder straps made of polyesterBranded zips and branding on the strap with floral graphic print on the frontBack padding for comfortTwo legs at the base, two wheels at the base with an extendable handle for ease of carrying CareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
